title: eulophia epidendraea
intro: Eulophia epidendraea, also known as the yellow helmet orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases. The health benefits of Eulophia epidendraea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of pain and infection. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, to treat a range of ailments.
